mapper.insert: INSERT INTO s_operation_log (method_name, operation_time, operation_desc, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES (#{methodName}, #{operationTime}, #{operationDesc}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: SELECT id, method_name, operation_time, operation_desc, ip_address, user_agent FROM s_operation_log ORDER BY operation_time DESC
SELECT id, method_name, operation_time, operation_desc, ip_address, user_agent FROM s_operation_log WHERE method_name = #{methodName} ORDER BY operation_time DESC
